text: Here's what science actually says about fiber and microbes. Fiber isn’t just a filler in our diets. It feeds the good microbes in our gut. But did you know that not all fibers impact our microbes equally? Research shows soluble fiber promotes beneficial bacteria, improving gut health. This balance supports digestion and can even impact our mood! Curious about your gut health? Check your fiber intake and follow for more insights!
